summary: U5 PatternHealthPanel refactor + Learning Ops page (with reviewer leaderboard) end-to-end tested. All 10 pytest tests in test_learning_core_events.py pass (incl. 2 new leaderboard tests). All 16 new API regression tests in test_u5_ops_leaderboard_api.py pass. UI: /learning/ops, /intake/learning (dual PatternHealthPanel), and /ai-learning (ap_posting panel) all render with every listed data-testid present. Leaderboard ranks sally.rep(7) > marcus.ap(4) > jenna.admin(2) with medal emojis + domain badges + top_event_type. Window selector re-fetches. Sidebar 'Learning Ops' nav link routes correctly. Seed data cleaned.

issues: React hydration console warnings: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>', '<option> cannot be a child of <span>', '<tbody> contains <span>'. These come from the Emergent visual-editor's injected '<span data-ve-dynamic>' wrappers around array-rendered rows, NOT from app code. App renders and behaves correctly, but the dev-env warnings are noisy. Safe to ignore for prod but worth flagging.

critical_code_review_comments: events_service.get_reviewer_leaderboard applies a runtime clamp (days max 90) but the router also declares Query(ge=1, le=90) — days=999 returns HTTP 422 rather than being silently clamped. Harmless but inconsistent with the function-level clamp; pick one. Test accepts both.
LearningOpsPage fires 5 parallel fetches including drift/summary and drift/alerts which overlap in information. Consider dropping one to simplify but not blocking.
PatternHealthPanel limits perScope client-side with slice(0, limit) even though the backend already honours ?limit=N. Minor double-guard.
actor='test' exclusion is string-literal; production actors named literally 'test' would be filtered — contract consistent with ask but worth documenting.
seed_data_creation: Cleaned up: 13 learning_events_v2 docs with scope_value='U5-OPS-SEED' (seeded by main agent) + 1 actor='TEST_u5' event created by this test suite's TestUnifiedFeedbackRegression.test_customer_feedback. Verified via delete_many results. Environment is clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: U5 (PatternHealthPanel + Learning Ops + leaderboard) is GREEN. Leaderboard endpoint: GET /api/learning/reviewers/leaderboard?days=7&limit=10 returns {window_days, since, total_events, unique_actors, reviewers[{actor,events,domains,top_event_type}]}, sorted desc, actor='test' excluded. Regression on U3/U4/drift/hygiene intact. Hydration console warnings on pages with tables come from the Emergent visual-editor injecting <span> wrappers — not app bugs.
